mapper.select: SELECT station_code AS stationCode, station_name AS stationName, district_name AS districtName, latitude, longitude, aqi AS aqi, aqi_level AS aqiLevel, aqi_level_desc AS levelDesc, pm25, pm10, so2, no2, co, o3, update_time AS updateTime FROM ads_realtime_aqi WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY aqi DESC

SELECT station_code AS stationCode, station_name AS stationName, monitor_time AS monitorTime, pm25, pm10, so2, no2, co, o3, aqi, aqi_level AS aqiLevel, quality_level AS qualityLevel FROM dwd_air_quality_dt WHERE station_code = #{stationCode} AND monitor_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY monitor_time DESC

SELECT s.station_code AS stationCode, s.station_name AS stationName, s.latitude, s.longitude, r.aqi, r.aqi_level AS aqiLevel, r.pm25, r.pm10, r.so2, r.no2, r.co, r.o3, r.update_time AS updateTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dws_station_hour WHERE station_code = #{stationCode} AND day >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND aqi_avg <= 100) AS cleanDays30, (SELECT AVG(aqi_avg) FROM dws_station_hour WHERE station_code = #{stationCode} AND day >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30)) AS avgAqi30 FROM dim_station s LEFT JOIN ads_realtime_aqi r ON s.station_code = r.station_code WHERE s.station_code = #{stationCode}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT station_code) AS stationCount, AVG(aqi) AS avgAqi, MAX(aqi) AS maxAqi, MIN(aqi) AS minAqi, SUM(CASE WHEN aqi <= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cleanDays, AVG(CASE WHEN aqi <= 100 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS cleanRate, (SELECT pollutant FROM ads_daily_pollutant WHERE stat_date = #{date}) AS mainPollutant FROM dwd_air_quality_dt WHERE dt = #{date}
